question_text: Which statement correctly describes average speed?

options.label: A
options.text: The speed at one exact moment in time

options.label: B
options.text: The total distance travelled divided by the total time taken

options.label: D
options.text: The maximum speed reached during a journey

explanation: Average speed is calculated by dividing the total distance travelled by the total time taken for the journey. It gives an overall picture of how fast something was moving on average, even if the speed changed during the journey.
